issues.title: feat: Auth issue 1 - edge-case failure
issues.body:
Observed a problem in Auth. Steps to reproduce:
1) Prepare dataset
2) Run the auth flow
3) Observe failure.

Expected: Auth should handle this gracefully.

Notes: This was seen in Dec 2023 testing and reproduced in staging.

comments.body: I can reproduce this locally; collecting logs.
Assigning to backend to investigate index and query plans.
